name: wpframeblocks/code-syntax-highlighter
title: Code Syntax Highlighter
description: Renders syntax-highlighted code with Shiki tokenization. Tokens are pre-computed in the editor and served as static HTML on the frontend.

code.default:
<?php

function greet( string $name ): string {
    return "Hello, {$name}!";
}

echo greet( 'World' );
